reservation.name: Name
reservation.cancellationPolicy: By submitting your reservation, you accept our reservation terms: Free cancellation or changes are possible up to 24 hours before your appointment. In case of unexcused no-show or late cancellation, we reserve the right to charge a no-show fee.
reservation.successMessage: We will confirm your reservation shortly by email or phone.

socialProof.title: What our guests say
socialProof.subtitle: Live Google and Trustpilot ratings coming soon — a preview of our premium experience for now.

reviews.wagyu: Best wagyu in Duisburg — tender, perfectly grilled and a true experience.
reviews.doner: The wet-aged döner is a dream. Nothing like it in the city.
reviews.service: First-class service and an atmosphere you feel instantly.
reviews.atmosphere: Premium steakhouse vibes in the heart of Duisburg. Highly recommended.
